description: Create a content slide on expectations for the environment in 2024 in historical context, using a sidebar-left layout with a line chart of global agreement percentages from 2017 to 2024.

header.headline: Expectations for the environment in 2024 in an historical context
header.sub: Please indicate if you agree very much, agree somewhat, disagree somewhat or disagree very much with the following statements...?

sidebar.body: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024

main.title:
Global averages - % agree
The average global temperature will increase
